metadata.scheme_name: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar Meritorious Student Award Scheme

raw_data.details: The "Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar Meritorious Student Award Scheme" was launched by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, to encourage students from the Scheduled Caste category to achieve high academic scores and motivate them to pursue higher education. This scheme awards special prizes to meritorious Scheduled Caste students who secure the highest marks in the Class 10th and 12th board examinations conducted by the Board of Secondary Education, CBSE, and ICSE in the state.
raw_data.benefits: Awards for securing the highest marks in the Class 10th Board examinations:1st prize (Boy/Girl): ₹30,0002nd prize (Boy/Girl): ₹25,0003rd prize (Boy/Girl): ₹20,0004th prize (Only Girl): ₹15,0005th prize (Only Girl): ₹10,0006th prize (Only Girl): ₹5,000Awards for securing the highest marks in the Class 12th Board examinations:1st prize (Boy/Girl): ₹51,0002nd prize (Boy/Girl): ₹40,0003rd prize (Boy/Girl): ₹30,0004th prize (Only Girl): ₹20,0005th prize (Only Girl): ₹15,0006th prize (Only Girl): ₹10,000Note: Payments are made into the bank accounts of the applicants.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh. Meritorious students from Scheduled Caste categories who secure the highest marks in the Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations (Board of Secondary Education, CBSE, or ICSE) in the state are eligible for the award. The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste category.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineStudents studying in the school must submit their applications to the head of the institution. In the institute or hostel where the student is admitted, the head of the institute or superintendent will complete the necessary formalities upon receiving the application.
raw_data.documents_required: Passport-size PhotographAadhaar cardDomicile certificate of Madhya PradeshCaste certificate Income certificatePassing marksheet with the highest marks in the stateSamagra IDBank account details/Bank PassbookOther necessary documents if required
raw_data.scheme_name: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar Meritorious Student Award Scheme

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the award?
faqs.answer: Students who are natives of Madhya Pradesh, belong to the Scheduled Caste category, and secure the highest marks in their Class 10th or 12th board examinations (Board of Secondary Education, CBSE, or ICSE) are eligible.

faqs.question: How are the prizes distributed?
faqs.answer: The prizes are awarded to the top-performing students based on their marks in Class 10th and 12th board examinations. Payments are made directly into the bank accounts of the recipients.

faqs.question: Do the awards differ for boys and girls?
faqs.answer: Yes, there are specific awards for boys and girls, with some awards exclusively for girls.

faqs.question: How can students apply for the award?
faqs.answer: Students must submit their applications to the head of their institution. The head of the institution will then complete the necessary formalities.

faqs.question: What documents are required for applying?
faqs.answer: Applicants generally need to provide proof of their marks, proof of Scheduled Caste status, and proof of residency in Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Is there an application fee for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, there is no application fee for participating in the scheme.

faqs.question: Can students from private schools apply for this award?
faqs.answer: Yes, students from both government and private schools are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How is the scheme funded?
faqs.answer: The scheme is funded by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh.
